name: Atonement
developer: 几几不小心, 几几不小心
short_description: It is a first-person realistic horror shooting game built with Unreal Engine 5. It tells the story of the protagonist waking up from a coma and losing his memory, exploring the truth of the story. Players will experience realistic scenes, oppressive monster battles and a terrifying story process.
detailed_description:
Zuishu is a super-realistic single-player first-person shooter game built with the latest technology of the next-generation Unreal Engine 5 game engine. Developed independently by a domestic game enthusiast and game anchor, the game uses a body camera perspective plus realistic graphics, spatial sound reverberation effects and simulated real gun feel to give players an immersive experience.

Background story

The protagonist loses his memory and appears in a dark room. During the escape, there seem to be two voices echoing in his mind, and he encounters mutated monsters. During the game, the truth of the story is gradually explored. When the player understands the truth behind the story and gradually reveals the true identity of the protagonist, the player's choice will usher in different endings for the protagonist to complete self-salvation.

Key points of the game

-New innovative interactive gameplay, the player's microphone volume affects the status of characters and monsters in real time

-Realistic first-person body camera perspective

-Simulation of real shooting feel and sound effects, facing monsters with simulated fear heartbeat sound effects and other feedback to enhance the immersion of the game

-Monsters with a strong sense of oppression and more realistic simulated physical attack feedback

-Weather changes include realistic scenes such as fog, light rain, heavy rain, and indoor and outdoor sound effects simulation on rainy days

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Russian, Hungarian, Turkish, Norwegian, Japanese, Polish, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Dutch, Portuguese - Portugal, Arabic
*languages with full audio support
